attributes.action: PLEASE make Keir Starmer resign. He is a disgrace to the UK.
attributes.additional_details:
So many reasons we need this resignation: the Lord Mandelson scandal, the economy is dying, the immigration crisis continues...
Starmer needs to take the accountability he keeps talking about and stop using the Conservative party's failures as a cover for his own inability to run the country. He measures his own effectiveness against them too often, refuses to answer questions and blames all his innumerable mistakes on ignorance or other people. This will not do. Starmer has had his time.
attributes.background: Don't leave us floundering with Keir Starmer as our Prime Minister. He needs to resign or be subjected to a vote of no confidence. He won the last General Election not because we wanted him, but because the Conservatives were broken. Labour is now more than broken, and is positively destructive.
